_comment: Conformance fixture 36 — custom (creator-authored) recipe slug ignored by the deterministic engine. Per SPEC §5.1 + decision #12, custom recipes are AI-only — the engine ignores them silently. Item carries `make_it_groovy_creator_custom` (free-text creator-authored slug, NOT in the built-in registry). Engine renders as if no recipe present (defaults).
name: Custom Recipe Ignored Conformance Fixture
